examTitle: CEFR A1 Mock Reading and Use of English: Sport & Fitness

parts.title: Part 1: Multiple-Choice Reading Comprehension on Fitness
parts.content: The gym is a place where people go to exercise. They do this to get fit and healthy. Some people go to the gym every day. They use machines and do exercises to build muscle. Others go to the gym to run on the treadmill or use the exercise bike. The gym also has a swimming pool and a sauna. People can go to the gym to relax and have fun. The gym is a great place to meet new people and make friends. The gym is open from 8am to 10pm. People can go to the gym at any time.
parts.instructions: Read the text. Choose the correct answer A, B or C.

questions.question: What is the gym?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'A place to exercise' because the text states that people go to the gym to exercise. The other options are incorrect because they do not match the information in the text.
questions.tips: Read the text carefully and look for the main idea. Then, choose the answer that best matches the idea.

questions.question: Why do people go to the gym?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'To exercise and get fit' because the text states that people go to the gym to exercise and build muscle. The other options are incorrect because they do not match the information in the text.
questions.tips: Look for the reasons why people go to the gym. Then, choose the answer that best matches those reasons.

questions.question: What can people do at the gym?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'Both of the above' because the text states that people can run on the treadmill or use the exercise bike at the gym. The other options are incorrect because they do not match the information in the text.
questions.tips: Look for the activities that people can do at the gym. Then, choose the answer that best matches those activities.

questions.question: What time is the gym open?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is '8am to 10pm' because the text states that the gym is open from 8am to 10pm. The other options are incorrect because they do not match the information in the text.
questions.tips: Look for the time that the gym is open. Then, choose the answer that best matches that time.

questions.question: Why is the gym a great place?
options: Because it is a place to buy food
Because it is a place to exercise and meet new people
Because it is a place to sleep
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'Because it is a place to exercise and meet new people' because the text states that the gym is a great place to meet new people and make friends. The other options are incorrect because they do not match the information in the text.
questions.tips: Look for the reasons why the gym is a great place. Then, choose the answer that best matches those reasons.

questions.question: What can people do at the gym to relax?
options: Go to the swimming pool or sauna
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'Go to the swimming pool or sauna' because the text states that people can go to the gym to relax and have fun, and that the gym has a swimming pool and a sauna. The other options are incorrect because they do not match the information in the text.
questions.tips: Look for the activities that people can do at the gym to relax. Then, choose the answer that best matches those activities.

parts.title: Part 2: Multiple Matching on Fitness
content: A. The gym is a great place to meet new people and make friends.
B. People can go to the gym to relax and have fun.
C. The gym is open from 8am to 10pm.
D. People can go to the gym to run on the treadmill or use the exercise bike.
E. The gym has a swimming pool and a sauna.
F. People go to the gym to exercise and get fit.

parts.title: Part 3: Multiple-Choice Reading Comprehension on Fitness
content: The gym is a great place to exercise and get fit. The gym has a swimming pool and a sauna. People can go to the gym to run on the treadmill or use the exercise bike.
The gym is open from 8am to 10pm. People can go to the gym at any time.
The gym is a place to meet new people and make friends.
The gym has a lot of equipment for exercising, such as dumbbells and exercise machines.
People can go to the gym to relax and have fun.
The gym is a great place to learn new exercises and get tips from trainers.
